description: Every AppMagic API operation as a typed command, plus the chart history, computed deltas, and entitlement awareness that no other AppMagic tool has.

tools.name: ad-spend_get-applications
tools.description: Retrieves information about the amount of money (in dollars) spent on advertising for specified applications. Required: aggregation, countries, store, store_application_id. Returns the new AdSpendChartResponse.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store

params.name: store_application_id
params.description: Application id in store, for example `com.helixload.syxme.vkmp`

tools.name: adint_get-ad-source-values
tools.description: Retrieves a list of available values for adSource parameter. Use /adint/filter_values instead. Returns array of string.

tools.name: adint_get-ads-stats
tools.description: Retrieves aggregated data over the specified time period with impressions breakdown by country/region, source, networks and platforms. Required: country, dateFrom, dateTo, aggregation. Optional: appIds, publisherId, categoryId (plus 1 more). Returns the AdsStats.

params.name: appIds
params.description: Application id in store, for example `com.helixload.syxme.vkmp`

params.name: publisherId
params.description: Publisher id in store, for example `1220872289`

params.name: tagSets
params.description: Comma separated tag ids, for example `243572,126`

params.name: aggregation
params.description: Creatives will be summarazed in given period

tools.name: adint_get-application-ads
tools.description: Retrieves links to ad creatives for the selected app over the selected period of time. Ad creatives can be sorted by date of introduction or by their impressions score. Required: country, dateFrom, dateTo, sort, aggregation. Optional: appIds, loadLastSeen, count (default: 100) (plus 8 more). Returns array of CreativeInfos.

params.name: appIds
params.description: Application id in store, for example `com.helixload.syxme.vkmp`

params.name: aggregation
params.description: Creatives will be summarazed in given period

params.name: offset
params.description: Offset is the position in the dataset of a particular record.

params.name: adSource
params.description: For the list of available values see /adint/filter_values

tools.name: adint_get-creative-stats
tools.description: Retrieves all the data required to produce a popup window with the selected ad creative: the app it advertises, the actual creative with its videos and images, and its impressions history and breakdown by country/region, networks, and apps where the selected creative was shown. Required: country, id. Returns the CreativeStats.

tools.name: adint_get-filter-values
tools.description: Valid values for filtering in Ad Intelligence endpoints. Returns the AdFilterValuesResponse.

tools.name: adint_get-series
tools.description: Retrieves Ad Intelligence series data (impressions over time) for selected countries and creative IDs. Optional: adNetwork, adSource, aggregation (plus 13 more). Returns array of AdLine.

params.name: adNetwork
params.description: Ad network to filter by. For the list of available values see /adint/filter_values

params.name: adSource
params.description: Ad source to filter by. For the list of available values see /adint/filter_values.

params.name: aggregation
params.description: Aggregation period for the time series.

params.name: appIds
params.description: Application id in store, for example 'com.helixload.syxme.vkmp'

params.name: categoryId
params.description: Category ids to filter by. See /categories for the list of values.

params.name: country
params.description: Countries to filter by. For the list of available values see /adint/filter_values

params.name: offset
params.description: Offset is the position in the dataset of a particular record.

params.name: publisherId
params.description: Publisher id in store, for example 'WeChat'

params.name: splitBy
params.description: Dimensions to split the series by.

params.name: tagSets
params.description: Tag sets to filter by. Each inner array is a set of tag IDs.

params.name: type
params.description: Creative type to filter by. For the list of available values see /adint/filter_values

tools.name: app-categories_get
tools.description: Internal usage only. Returns array of AppCategory.

tools.name: app-publishers_get
tools.description: Internal usage only. Returns array of AppPublisher.

tools.name: app-tags_get
tools.description: Internal usage only. Returns array of AppTag.

tools.name: app-transfers_get
tools.description: Retrieves the list of apps that have been assigned to the selected publisher's account. Optional: date_from, date_to, category_ids (plus 2 more). Returns array of AppTransfer.

params.name: united_publisher_id
params.description: Appmagic internal id of united publisher

tools.name: applications_add
tools.description: Submits an array of app IDs that are missing from our system. In 48 hours or less, their data will be added.

tools.name: applications_get
tools.description: Retrieves the App Info data for the apps searched by their names or name prefixes. Required: search. Optional: limit (default: 100), offset (default: 0). Returns array of Application.

params.name: search
params.description: Search queries. Search queries are based on prefixes. For example, you will find “Fortnite”...

params.name: offset
params.description: Offset is the position in the dataset of a particular record.

tools.name: applications_get-app-info-by-country
tools.description: Retrieves application info by country. Required: country, store, store_application_id. Returns the new AppInfoByCountryResp.

params.name: country
params.description: The 'country' validator is not used here, because app info can be retrieved for an unsupported country as well

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store

params.name: store_application_id
params.description: Application id in store, for example `com.helixload.syxme.vkmp`

tools.name: applications_get-app-info-by-country-releases
tools.description: Retrieves info on application releases by country. Required: country, store, store_application_id. Returns array of ApplicationRelease.

params.name: country
params.description: The 'country' validator is not used here, because app info can be retrieved for an unsupported country as well

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store

params.name: store_application_id
params.description: Application id in store, for example `com.helixload.syxme.vkmp`

tools.name: applications_get-by-ids
tools.description: Retrieves the App Info data for the array of apps with selected IDs. Returns array of Application.

tools.name: applications_get-release-notes
tools.description: Retrieves information about releases on the selected date for an array of apps. Required: application_ids, date. Returns array of ReleaseNote.

tools.name: applications_get-reviews
tools.description: Retrieves raw user reviews for a given application from app stores. Supports filtering by country, date range (YYYY-MM-DD), and exact star rating (1-5). Results are ordered by review date descending. Required: store, store_application_id. Optional: country, date_from, date_to (plus 3 more). Returns array of RepositoriesReviewRecord.

params.name: date_from
params.description: Start of review_created_at range (inclusive). Format: YYYY-MM-DD

params.name: date_to
params.description: End of review_created_at range (inclusive). Format: YYYY-MM-DD

params.name: rating
params.description: Filter by star rating (1-5). Only reviews with this exact rating are returned.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market, 2 - iPhone App Store, 3 - iPad App Store

tools.name: applications_get-store
tools.description: Retrieves the App Info data by an app's store ID. Required: store (default: 1), store_application_id. Returns the Application.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store

params.name: store_application_id
params.description: Application id in store, for example `com.helixload.syxme.vkmp`

tools.name: applications_competitors_get-application
tools.description: Retrieves a list of app's competitors. Native applications are excluded to reduce response size. Required: store (default: 1), store_application_id. Returns the CompetitorsResponse.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store

params.name: store_application_id
params.description: Application id in store, for example `com.helixload.syxme.vkmp`

tools.name: applications_info_get-application
tools.description: Retrieves information from the app's store page: ranking, price, downloads, etc. Required: store (default: 1), store_application_id. Returns the ApplicationInfo.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store

params.name: store_application_id
params.description: Application id in store, for example `com.helixload.syxme.vkmp`

tools.name: applications_release-notes_get-application
tools.description: Retrieves all the Release Notes for the app you've identified by its store ID. Required: store (default: 1), store_application_id. Returns array of ReleaseNote.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store

params.name: store_application_id
params.description: Application id in store, for example `com.helixload.syxme.vkmp`

tools.name: applications_screenshots_get-application
tools.description: Retrieves all the screenshots for the app you've identified by its store ID. Required: store (default: 1), store_application_id. Returns array of Screenshot.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store

params.name: store_application_id
params.description: Application id in store, for example `com.helixload.syxme.vkmp`

tools.name: applications_similarity_get-application
tools.description: Retrieves a list of apps 'similar' to the selected app. The similarity between apps is calculated as a score based on own recommendation systems in the App Store / Google Play. Required: store (default: 1), store_application_id. Optional: country (default: US). Returns array of Similarity.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store

params.name: store_application_id
params.description: Application id in store, for example `com.helixload.syxme.vkmp`

params.name: country
params.description: Currently supported countries: US, CN, KR, JP

tools.name: apps-downloads_get
tools.description: Internal usage only. Required: country. Returns array of GetAppsDownloadsOkbodyItems0.

tools.name: arpdau_get-arp-dau-chart
tools.description: Returns Average Revenue Per Daily Active User over time. Required: aggregation, countries, store, store_application_id. Optional: date_end, date_start.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market, 2 - iPhone App Store, 3 - iPad App Store

params.name: store_application_id
params.description: Application id in store, for example `com.helixload.syxme.vkmp`

tools.name: asa_get-by-app
tools.description: Retrieves a list of top terms by place for each of given apps. Required: appIds, countries. Optional: count (default: 20), dateFrom, dateTo (plus 1 more). Returns array of AsaByAppResponseTopsItems0.

params.name: count
params.description: Number of top keywords to return.

params.name: countries
params.description: For list of available countries see /filter_values.

tools.name: asa_get-by-keyword
tools.description: Retrieves a list of top apps by share ov voice for each of given keywords. Optional: count (default: 20), countries, dateFrom (plus 2 more). Returns array of AsaByKeywordResponseTopsItems0.

params.name: count
params.description: Number of top keywords to return.

params.name: countries
params.description: For list of available countries see /filter_values.

tools.name: asa_get-dates
tools.description: Retrieves the date range for which ASA data is available in our system. Returns the AsaAsoDates.

tools.name: asa_get-filter-values
tools.description: Retrieves the list of countries that can be used to filter data in the /asa endpoints. Returns array of string.

tools.name: asa_get-series
tools.description: Retrieves a list of share of voice series for given filter split by all possible filter values combinations. Required: appId, countries, terms. Optional: aggregation (default: day). Returns array of AsaAsoSeriesResponseDataItems0.

params.name: countries
params.description: For list of available countries see /asa/filter_values.

tools.name: aso_get-by-app
tools.description: Retrieves a list of top terms by place for each of given apps. Required: appIds, countries. Optional: count (default: 20), dateFrom, dateTo (plus 1 more). Returns array of AsoByAppResponseTopsItems0.

params.name: count
params.description: Number of top keywords to return.

params.name: countries
params.description: For list of available countries see /filter_values.

tools.name: aso_get-by-keyword
tools.description: Retrieves a list of top apps by place for each of given keywords. Optional: count (default: 20), countries, dateFrom (plus 2 more). Returns array of AsoByKeywordResponseTopsItems0.

params.name: count
params.description: Number of top keywords to return.

params.name: countries
params.description: For list of available countries see /filter_values.

tools.name: aso_get-dates
tools.description: Retrieves the date range for which ASO data is available in our system. Returns the AsaAsoDates.

tools.name: aso_get-filter-values
tools.description: Retrieves the list of countries that can be used to filter data in the /aso endpoints. Returns array of string.

tools.name: aso_get-series
tools.description: Retrieves a list of place series for given filter split by all possible filter values combinations. Required: appId, countries, terms. Optional: aggregation (default: day). Returns array of AsaAsoSeriesResponseDataItems0.

params.name: countries
params.description: For list of available countries see /aso/filter_values.

tools.name: categories_get
tools.description: Retrieves a list of categories with names and IDs for respective stores. Returns array of Category.

tools.name: contacts_get-companies
tools.description: Retrieves contact details of employees of the selected company. Required: id. Returns array of Company.

tools.name: contacts_get-profiles
tools.description: Retrieves a list of employees of the selected company that can be further filtered to include or exclude specific positions. Required: company_id. Optional: page (default: 1), person_not_titles, person_titles. Returns array of Profile.

tools.name: country-downloads_get
tools.description: Internal usage only. Returns array of CountryDownloads.

tools.name: dau_get-chart
tools.description: Retrieves the number of daily active unique users. If aggregation is set to 'week' or 'month', average DAU for this period will be returned. The API returns data as a list of pairs (arrays with two values). Each pair represents a point in time and a corresponding value. Required: aggregation, countries, store, store_application_id. Optional: date_end, date_start.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store

params.name: store_application_id
params.description: Application id in store, for example `com.helixload.syxme.vkmp`

tools.name: featuring_get
tools.description: Retrieves data on featuring of an application in App Store or Google Play for a specific date. Required: store, store_application_id, country, date. Optional: sort, order, store_version (plus 3 more). Returns array of FeaturingRecord.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store

params.name: store_application_id
params.description: Application id in store, for example `com.helixload.syxme.vkmp`

params.name: store_version
params.description: Available versions of App Store are 2 and 3. For Google Play store version is always 0.

params.name: type
params.description: 1 - Page 2 - Top Banner 3 - Collection 4 - Promo Collection 5 - Banner 6 - Big Banner 7 - Category Link 8 - Article 9 - Video Collection 10 - Medium Collection 11 - Big Collection Type refers to the type of placement retrieved from both Google Play and App Store and grouped based on common parameters

tools.name: history_get-application
tools.description: Retrieves all data for one specific app for the selected period of time. Required: store, store_application_id, country. Optional: aggregation (default: daily), date_from, date_to (plus 1 more). Returns array of Record.

params.name: aggregation
params.description: Data will be summarized in given period

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store

params.name: store_application_id
params.description: Application id in store, for example `com.helixload.syxme.vkmp`

tools.name: history_get-applications
tools.description: Retrieves data for up to 100 apps for the selected date. The array of app IDs is transmitted to the body with information such as date, aggregation, category, and country/region. All parameters are compulsory except for aggregation and category. Aggregation is daily by default. For any other aggregation values, the date is rounded to the beginning of the time period. Required: application_ids, country, date. Optional: aggregation (default: daily), category_id. Returns array of Record.

params.name: aggregation
params.description: Data will be summarazed in given period

params.name: category_id
params.description: Store categories are set to “Overall” by default. See [categories section](#tag/categories)

tools.name: history_get-dau
tools.description: Retrieves dau for a list of applications for a specific date with daily aggregation. Required: application_ids, countries, date. Returns array of DauHistory.

tools.name: history_get-dau-for-united-applications
tools.description: Retrieves dau for a list of associated applications for a specific date. Data aggregation is daily. Required: countries, date, store, united_application_ids. Returns array of UnitedApplicationsDauHistory.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store 4 - iPhone + iPad 5 - All stores

tools.name: history_get-mau
tools.description: Retrieves mau for a list of applications for a specific date rounded to the beginning of the month. Required: application_ids, countries, date. Returns array of MauHistory.

tools.name: history_get-mau-for-united-applications
tools.description: Retrieves mau for a list of associated applications for a specific date. Data aggregation is monthly. The date from a request rounds to the start of month. Required: countries, date, store, united_application_ids. Returns array of UnitedApplicationsMauHistory.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store 4 - iPhone + iPad 5 - All stores

tools.name: history_get-retention
tools.description: Retrieves retention data for a list of applications for a specific date. Required: application_ids, country, date. Returns array of RetentionHistory.

tools.name: history_get-session-stats
tools.description: Retrieves session stats for a list of applications for a specific date with daily aggregation. Required: application_ids, countries, date. Returns array of SessionStatsHistory.

tools.name: history_get-session-stats-for-united-applications
tools.description: Retrieves session stats for a list of associated applications for a specific date. Data aggregation is daily. Required: countries, date, store, united_application_ids. Returns array of UnitedApplicationsSessionStatsHistory.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store 4 - iPhone + iPad 5 - All stores

tools.name: history_get-united-application
tools.description: Retrieves all data for one specific associated app for the selected period of time. Required: store, united_application_id, country. Optional: aggregation (default: daily), date_from, date_to. Returns array of UnitedRecord.

params.name: aggregation
params.description: Data will be summarized in given period

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store 4 - iPhone + iPad App Store 5...

params.name: united_application_id
params.description: Appmagic internal id of united application

tools.name: history_get-united-applications
tools.description: Retrieves data for up to 100 associated apps for the selected date. The set of app IDs is fed into the body with information such as date, aggregation, category, and country/region. All parameters are compulsory except for aggregation and category. Aggregation is daily by default. For any other aggregation values, the date is rounded to the beginning of the time period. Required: date, store, united_application_ids, country. Optional: aggregation (default: daily). Returns array of UnitedRecord.

params.name: aggregation
params.description: Data will be summarized in given period

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store 4 - iPhone + iPad App Store 5...

params.name: united_application_ids
params.description: Appmagic internal id of united application. Max 100 items

tools.name: history_get-united-retention
tools.description: Retrieves retention data for a list of associated applications for a specific date. Required: country, date, store, united_application_ids. Returns array of UnitedRetentionHistory.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store 4 - iPhone + iPad 5 - All stores

tools.name: keywords_get-all
tools.description: Retrieves a list of users' keywords. Only available with access to Ad Intelligence. Returns array of string.

tools.name: last-date_get
tools.description: Retrieves the most recent date for which all metrics (e.g., revenue, downloads) are available in our system. Returns the HandlersLastDateResponse.

tools.name: last-versions_get
tools.description: Get a last version. Required: store. Optional: page (default: 1), per_page (default: 1000). Returns array of Version.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store

params.name: per_page
params.description: The number of items returned per page.

tools.name: live-ops_get
tools.description: Events info from LiveOps & Updates Calendar. Optional: game_name, group_id. Returns array of LiveOps.

params.name: group_id
params.description: Group id unites all appearances of the event that was perceived as the same event by players, even if it has multiple versions. This query parameter is optional.

tools.name: live-ops_get-calendar
tools.description: Dates of events and updates from LiveOps & Updates Calendar. Optional: game_name, date. Returns array of LiveOpsCalendar.

tools.name: live-ops_get-games
tools.description: List of games covered in LiveOps & Updates Calendar. Optional: game_name. Returns array of Game.

tools.name: live-ops_get-tags-values
tools.description: Retrieves a list of available tag values in /live-ops/live-ops response. Returns the LiveOpsGetTagsValuesResponse.

tools.name: live-ops_get-updates
tools.description: Updates info from LiveOps & Updates Calendar. Optional: game_name, date. Returns array of Update.

tools.name: market-segments_get-cumulative-data
tools.description: Retrieves aggregated data for the selected market segment, such as store, country/region, tags, etc., as dynamic variables over time. Required: country, store, tags. Returns the new CumulativeMarketSegmentResponse.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store 4 - iPhone + iPad App Store 5...

tools.name: mau_get-chart
tools.description: Retrieves the number of monthly active unique users. The API returns data as a list of pairs (arrays with two values). Each pair represents a point in time and a corresponding value. Required: countries, store, store_application_id. Optional: date_end, date_start.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store

params.name: store_application_id
params.description: Application id in store, for example `com.helixload.syxme.vkmp`

tools.name: period-comparison_get-custom-apps
tools.description: Returns period-over-period metrics for a specific list of apps identified by their united application IDs. Required: countries, current_period, ids, previous_period, store.

tools.name: period-comparison_get-last-date
tools.description: Returns the most recent date for which period comparison data is available.

tools.name: period-comparison_get-top-apps
tools.description: Returns a ranked list of apps with their metrics compared across two time periods. Required: countries, limit, sort_by_field, sort_by_type. Optional: current_downloads_range, current_period, current_revenue_range (plus 5 more).

tools.name: publishers_get
tools.description: Retrieves publishers by their names or name prefixes. Required: search. Optional: limit (default: 100), offset (default: 0). Returns array of Publisher.

params.name: search
params.description: Search queries. Search queries are based on prefixes. For example, you will find “Fortnite”...

params.name: offset
params.description: Offset is the position in the dataset of a particular record.

tools.name: publishers_get-store
tools.description: Retrieves publishers by their store IDs. Required: store (default: 1), store_publisher_id. Returns the Publisher.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store

params.name: store_publisher_id
params.description: Publisher id in store, for example `VOODOO` or `714804730`

tools.name: publishers_applications_get-publisher
tools.description: Retrieves a list of apps by the selected publisher. Required: store (default: 1), store_publisher_id. Optional: size, offset (default: 0). Returns array of Application.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store

params.name: store_publisher_id
params.description: Publisher id in store, for example `VOODOO` or `714804730`

params.name: offset
params.description: Offset is the position in the dataset of a particular record. By specifying offset, you retrieve a subset of records starting with the offset value. Offset normally works with size, which determines how many records to retrieve starting from the offset. The maximum limit is 10,000 records.

tools.name: retention_get-data
tools.description: Deprecated.Use /retention-v2 instead. Required: countries, date_end, date_start, store, store_application_id. Returns the new ApplicationRetention.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store

params.name: store_application_id
params.description: Application id in store, for example `com.helixload.syxme.vkmp`

tools.name: retention-v2_get-retention-data-v2
tools.description: Retrieves application retention data for 1, 7, 14, 30, 60, 90, 180 and 360 days periods. Retention reflects the classic retention metric (the share of users to run the app again the next day/week/2 weeks/month/...), estimated as an average for users from the weekly installation cohort. Required: country, date_end, date_start, store, store_application_id. Returns the new ApplicationRetention.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store

params.name: store_application_id
params.description: Application id in store, for example `com.helixload.syxme.vkmp`

tools.name: sdkint_get-app-sdks
tools.description: Retrieves a list of SDKs for the app by its ID as parameter. Required: store, store_application_id. Returns array of Sdk.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store

params.name: store_application_id
params.description: Application id in store, for example `com.helixload.syxme.vkmp`

tools.name: sdkint_get-apps-by-sdk-changes
tools.description: Retrieves a list of apps that added or removed the selected SDKs over the specified period of time. The search can be narrowed down to a pre-transmitted array of app IDs. Required: date_from, date_to. Optional: added_sdks, application_ids, limit (default: 1000) (plus 2 more). Returns array of ApplicationId.

tools.name: sdkint_get-apps-by-sdks
tools.description: Retrieves a list of apps that do or do not have the selected SDKs. The search can be narrowed down to a pre-transmitted array of app IDs. Required: using_sdks. Optional: application_ids, limit (default: 1000), not_using_sdks (plus 1 more). Returns array of ApplicationId.

tools.name: sdkint_get-pubs-by-sdks
tools.description: Retrieves a list of publishers that do or do not have the selected SDKs. The search can be narrowed down to a pre-transmitted array of publisher IDs. Required: using_sdks. Optional: limit (default: 1000), not_using_sdks, offset (default: 0) (plus 1 more). Returns array of PublisherId.

tools.name: sdkint_get-sdks
tools.description: Retrieves a list of all the SDKs in our system. Returns array of Sdk.

tools.name: session-stats_get-applications
tools.description: Retrieves information about session length and average number of sessions for specified applications. Required: aggregation, countries, store, store_application_ids. Returns array of SessionStats.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store 4 - iPhone + iPad 5 - All stores

params.name: store_application_ids
params.description: To retrieve data for the united application, you need to provide all store application IDs for this application. To retrieve data for a child application, you need to provide the store application ID for that specific application.

tools.name: steam_get-app-info
tools.description: Steam app info. Required: app_id, country. Returns the SteamAppInfo.

tools.name: steam_get-app-metrics-by-countries
tools.description: Retrieves metrics (downloads and revenue) by countries for a specific Steam application. Required: app_id. Returns the SteamAppMetricsByCountriesResponse.

params.name: app_id
params.description: Steam application id from the store.

tools.name: steam_get-categories
tools.description: Retrieves category values for steam applications. Returns array of SteamCategory.

tools.name: steam_get-genres
tools.description: Retrieves genre values for steam applications. Returns array of SteamGenre.

tools.name: steam_get-last-date
tools.description: Retrieves the most recent date for which steam data is available in our system. Returns the LastDate.

tools.name: steam_get-metrics-chart
tools.description: Steam metrics chart. Required: countries. Optional: aggregation, app_id. Returns array of SteamMetricsChartRow.

tools.name: steam_get-retention-chart
tools.description: Steam retention chart. Required: countries. Optional: aggregation, app_id. Returns array of SteamRetentionChartRow.

tools.name: steam_get-tags
tools.description: Retrieves tag values for steam applications. Returns array of SteamTag.

tools.name: steam_get-top
tools.description: Retrieves the list of top free, top grossing and top wishlisted applications for the specified country and date. Required: aggregation, country, date. Optional: category_ids, genre_ids, limit (default: 100) (plus 1 more). Returns the HandlersGetSteamTopResp.

params.name: category_ids
params.description: Filter by category IDs. For available category IDs see /steam/categories

params.name: date
params.description: Date for which to retrieve the top data. See /steam/last-date for the most recent available date.

params.name: genre_ids
params.description: Filter by genre IDs. For available genre IDs see /steam/genres

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of records to return

params.name: tag_ids
params.description: Filter by tag IDs. For available tag IDs see /steam/tags

tools.name: steam_get-united-apps
tools.description: Steam united apps. Optional: app_id. Returns the HandlersGetUnitedAppsResponse.

tools.name: steam_get-user-activity-chart
tools.description: Steam user activity chart. Required: countries. Optional: aggregation, app_id. Returns array of SteamUserActivityChartRow.

tools.name: steam_get-wishlist-chart
tools.description: Steam wishlist chart. Required: countries. Optional: aggregation, app_id. Returns array of SteamWishlistChartRow.

tools.name: tags_get
tools.description: Retrieves a list of all our tags. Returns array of Tag.

tools.name: tops_advanced-search
tools.description: Retrieves search results by multiple criteria, including keywords in both app names and descriptions, release dates and periods, threshold metric values, etc. Required: release_date_gte, release_date_lte, country, store, size, sort. Optional: offset (default: 0), search_operator (default: OR), screenshots (default: false) (plus 17 more). Returns array of AdvancedSearchRecord.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store 4 - iPhone + iPad App Store 5...

params.name: offset
params.description: Offset is the position in the dataset of a particular record. By specifying offset, you retrieve a subset of records starting with the offset value. Offset normally works with size, which determines how many records to retrieve starting from the offset. The maximum limit is 10,000 records.

params.name: search_operator
params.description: Operator, how to match app name and description when searching

params.name: search
params.description: Use query building commands as conjunctions to combine or exclude keywords in a search: word1 AND word2 returns results with both keywords included; word1 OR word2 returns results with either (or both) keywords included; NOT word1 excludes any results containing the keyword it precedes; 'word1 word2' combines two or more keywords into one exact phrase to search for it specifically.

params.name: description
params.description: Use query building commands as conjunctions to combine or exclude keywords in a search: word1 AND word2 returns results with both keywords included; word1 OR word2 returns results with either (or both) keywords included; NOT word1 excludes any results containing the keyword it precedes; 'word1 word2' combines two or more keywords into one exact phrase to search for it specifically.

params.name: removed
params.description: Filter by removed from store status. True returns only apps removed from store, false returns only active apps.

params.name: publisherPlace
params.description: Topmost publishers based on the sum of revenue and downloads in the last 30 days.

tools.name: tops_get-applications
tools.description: Retrieves data on any app Top Chart (top free, top grossing, top featuring) for any country/region and date. Top Charts are comprised of native apps only (AppStore and Google Play); however, as opposed to native store charts, you can customize your aggregation dates. Required: sort, store, country, date. Optional: aggregation (default: daily), category_id, limit (default: 100) (plus 1 more). Returns array of Record.

params.name: aggregation
params.description: Data will be summarized in given period

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store

tools.name: tops_get-apps
tools.description: Retrieves data on any app Top Chart (top free, top grossing, top featuring) for any country/region and date. Top Charts are comprised of native apps only (AppStore and Google Play); however, as opposed to native store charts, you can customize your aggregation dates. The value in the response represents the corresponding metric for each chart: revenue for Top Grossing, number of downloads for Top Free and featuring score for Top Featuring. Required: country, date, sort, store. Optional: aggregation (default: daily), category_id, limit (default: 100) (plus 1 more). Returns array of ModelsApplicationTopRecord.

params.name: aggregation
params.description: Data will be summarazed in given period

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market, 2 - iPhone App Store, 3 - iPad App Store

tools.name: tops_get-ltv
tools.description: Get ltv. Required: store, country. Optional: tag_ids, limit (default: 100). Returns array of TopLtvRecord.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store 4 - iPhone + iPad App Store 5...

tools.name: tops_get-publishers
tools.description: Retrieves data on any publisher Top Chart (top free, top grossing, top featuring) for any country/region and any date. Top Charts are comprised of native apps only (AppStore and Google Play); however, as opposed to native store charts, you can customize your aggregation dates. Required: date, store, aggregation, countries, sort. Optional: tag_ids, headquarters, limit (default: 100). Returns array of PublisherTopRecord.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store 4 - iPhone + iPad App Store 5...

params.name: aggregation
params.description: Data will be summarized in given period

tools.name: tops_get-soft-launches
tools.description: Retrieves a list of apps for the selected genre that are currently in their soft launch stage and were launched in the specified time period; you can add and remove apps. The 'only_global_publisher' parameter filters out apps launched by publishers with no other apps in their portfolios. Required: date_from, date_to, include_countries, store, sort. Optional: exclude_countries, category_ids, only_global_publisher (plus 3 more). Returns array of SoftLaunchesRecord.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store 4 - iPhone + iPad App Store 5...

tools.name: tops_get-trending
tools.description: Retrieves a list of apps that have ranked up in the selected top chart for the selected country (or WW) over the specified time period. Use the 'new_only' parameter to additionally filter out apps that were released earlier or later than the specified time period. Required: store, type, country, date_from, date_to. Optional: limit (default: 100), depth (default: 10000), method (default: gainers) (plus 5 more). Returns array of TrendingRecord.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store 4 - iPhone + iPad App Store 5...

params.name: new_only
params.description: Apps that were either released in the specified time period in the selected country and/or apps that had not been previously featured in the top 10K.

params.name: kind
params.description: Show All, games only or apps only

tools.name: tops_get-united-applications
tools.description: Retrieves data on any associated app Top Chart (top free, top grossing, top featuring) for any country/region and date.You can customize your aggregation dates. Required: sort, store, country, date. Optional: aggregation (default: daily), limit (default: 100), tag_id. Returns array of UnitedRecord.

params.name: aggregation
params.description: Data will be summarized in given period

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store 4 - iPhone + iPad App Store 5...

tools.name: tops_get-united-apps
tools.description: Retrieves data on any associated app Top Chart (top free, top grossing, top featuring) for any country/region and date.You can customize your aggregation dates. Required: sort, store, country, date. Optional: aggregation (default: daily), limit (default: 100), tag_id. Returns array of UnitedApplicationTopRecord.

params.name: aggregation
params.description: Data will be summarazed in given period

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store 4 - iPhone + iPad App Store 5...

tools.name: united-applications_get
tools.description: Retrieves the App Info data for the associated apps searched by their names or name prefixes. Required: search. Optional: limit (default: 100), offset (default: 0). Returns array of UnitedApplication.

params.name: search
params.description: Search queries. Search queries are based on prefixes. For example, you will find “Fortnite”...

params.name: offset
params.description: Offset is the position in the dataset of a particular record.

tools.name: united-applications_get-by-app-ids
tools.description: Retrieves the App Info data for the associated apps identified by their store IDs. Returns array of UnitedApplication.

tools.name: united-applications_get-by-ids
tools.description: Retrieves the App Info data for the array of associated apps with our internal IDs. Returns array of UnitedApplication.

tools.name: united-applications_get-unitedapplications
tools.description: Retrieves the App Info data for the associated app with our internal ID. Required: id. Returns the UnitedApplication.

tools.name: united-applications_data-countries_get-united-application
tools.description: Retrieves data on revenue and downloads for the selected app broken down by country/region. Required: id. Returns array of DataCountriesRecord.

tools.name: united-applications_ltv_get-united-application
tools.description: Get united application. Required: id. Returns array of UnitedApplicationsLtvRecord.

tools.name: united-dau_get-chart
tools.description: Retrieves the number of daily active unique users for a united application. If aggregation is set to 'week' or 'month', average DAU for this period will be returned. The API returns data as a list of pairs (arrays with two values). Each pair represents a point in time and a corresponding value. Required: aggregation, countries, store, united_application_id. Optional: date_end, date_start.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store 4 - iPhone + iPad 5 - All stores

params.name: united_application_id
params.description: Appmagic internal id of united application

tools.name: united-mau_get-chart
tools.description: Retrieves the number of monthly active unique users for a united application. The API returns data as a list of pairs (arrays with two values). Each pair represents a point in time and a corresponding value. Required: countries, store, united_application_id. Optional: date_end, date_start.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store 4 - iPhone + iPad 5 - All stores

params.name: united_application_id
params.description: Appmagic internal id of united application

tools.name: united-publishers_get
tools.description: Retrieves associated publishers by their names or name prefixes. Required: search. Optional: limit (default: 100), offset (default: 0). Returns array of UnitedPublisher.

params.name: search
params.description: Search queries. Search queries are based on prefixes. For example, you will find “Fortnite”...

params.name: offset
params.description: Offset is the position in the dataset of a particular record.

tools.name: united-publishers_get-by-ids
tools.description: Retrieves a set of identified associated publishers based on the array of our internal IDs. Returns array of UnitedPublisher.

tools.name: united-publishers_get-lifetime-data
tools.description: Retrieves lifetime revenue and downloads for the selected associated publisher in the specified country/region (or WW). The search is carried out by their IDs and can include more than one publisher at the same time. Required: united_publisher_ids, countries. Returns array of UnitedPublisherLifetimeData.

tools.name: united-publishers_get-unitedpublishers
tools.description: Retrieves an identified associated publisher based on our internal ID. Required: id. Returns the UnitedPublisher.

tools.name: united-publishers_data-countries_get-united-publisher
tools.description: Retrieves data on revenue and downloads for the selected publisher broken down by country/region. Required: id. Returns array of DataCountriesRecord.

tools.name: united-publishers_united-applications_get-united-publisher
tools.description: Retrieves a list of all associated apps for the selected publisher with their lifetime revenues and downloads. Required: id. Returns array of UnitedApplication.

tools.name: united-retention_get-data
tools.description: Deprecated.Use /united-retention-v2 instead. Required: countries, date_end, date_start, store, united_application_id. Returns the new ApplicationRetention.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store 4 - iPhone + iPad 5 - All stores

params.name: united_application_id
params.description: Appmagic internal id of united application

tools.name: united-retention-v2_get-united-retention-data-v2
tools.description: Retrieves retention data for 1, 7, 14, 30, 60, 90, 180 and 360 days periods for an associated app. Retention reflects the classic retention metric (the share of users to run the app again the next day/week/2 weeks/month), estimated as an average for users from the weekly installation cohort. Required: country, date_end, date_start, store, united_application_id. Returns the new ApplicationRetention.

params.name: store
params.description: 1 - Google Play Market 2 - iPhone App Store 3 - iPad App Store 4 - iPhone + iPad 5 - All stores

params.name: united_application_id
params.description: Appmagic internal id of united application

tools.name: web-shop-revenue_get-chart
tools.description: Returns D2C (web shop) revenue chart data for a single application. Same as D2C revenue in Appmagic. Required: aggregation, countries, united_application_id.

params.name: aggregation
params.description: Aggregation period for the time series.

params.name: countries
params.description: Reliable figures are available for US, DE, GB, ES, FR, IT. All other regional data are rough estimates. For the full list of countries see [available countries](#tag/available-countries)
